titleStmt.title: SII 5.984: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 984. (A.R. No. 119 of 1896). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī (ḥ) . tri puvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 vatu miṉanāyaṟṟu Aparapakkattu caturtthi yum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttiraṭṭātinā ḷirācātirācavaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭeśva rakaṉmikaḷukku Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam rācātarācavaḷanāṭṭu
nāṅkūrnāṭṭu Erumaṟpiramamaṅkalattu kāṇiuṭaiya cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ Ulakelāntoḻaniṉṟāṉ tevarkaṇāyakaṉāṉa civatavaṉapallavaraiyaṉum Eṉ tampi kūttāṭuvāṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampala(pala)veḷāṉum Ivviruvom nilavilaipra māṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu Ivvūril Eṅkaḷ pitākkaḷ koṇṭuṭaiyarāyum stridha ṉam peṟṟu Ivar Apāvattu
Eṅkaḷutāyum Eṅkaḷil civatavaṉappallavaraiyaṉ stridha ṉam peṟṟum Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāya kantamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvaṉperil variyaṟṟu nāṅkaḷ Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nilattu Āṟumāveṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilaṅ kālum Innilattu kiḻtalaiyil maṉaittiṭalum ceṉṉalvaravai Enṟu perkūvapapaṭṭa nilamum vaṭakkilp paḷḷam
Enṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilamum teṟkil paḷḷam Enṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilamum Āka ṉaṭuvupaṭṭa ceṉṉalvaravai nilam4�- m vaṭakkilpaḷḷam nilam4 pa-m teṟkil paḷḷam nilam pa�-m Āka nilam I-m Iṉṉamum vāykkāl karaikkuṇṭenṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilam pa�-m Iṉṉamum nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭuttap paṟaccerikkuṇṭenṟu perkūvap
paṭṭa nilam �-m Iṉṉamum nāṅkaḷ viṟṟu kuṭukkiṟa kaḷattaṭi Eṉṟu perkūvappaṭṭa nilampama- m Āka nilamn=ta3 pamaThe total comes only to 1/2 and 3 mā and 1 kāṇi; there seems to be some omission of fields equal in extent to 5 mā.Iṉṉilam mukkāle muṉṟumāk kāṇiyum Eṅkaḷ per kāṇikkaṭamai puṟa Uṭal poṟkācu tirumuṉpukāḻccikkum niṉaippiṭṭut taṇṭum kācu Uḷpaṭṭa kaṭamaikaḷ piḷḷai meṉāṭṭaraiyar keṭṭaruḷi koḷḷa niccayittu nāṭṭu
kkoṇṭa kācukku Oṭukka Upāyamillāmaiyālum Iṉṉilam viṟṟu kācu Oṭukkaveṇṭukaiyālum Iṉṉilam veṟoruvar vilaikoḷvārillāmaiyālum Iṉṉāyaṉār koyil śrīmāheśva rarkkum tāṉattāṟkkum Iṉṉilattai tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kaikkoṇṭu kācu tantaruḷaveṇum Eṉṟu viṇṇappañceytu Ivarkaḷum
Ippaṭi ceyvatenṟu tiruviḷḷamāy Aruḷukaiyil Iṉṉilam mukkāle muṉṟu māk kāṇiyum mikuti kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Iṟṟaināḷil viṟṟukkuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmi licainta vilaipporu(ḷ) ḷanṟāṭu ṉaṟkācu 3 1000 Ikkācu muvaāyiramum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kaṭṭik kaiyccelavaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇa Icaivutiṭṭu
kuṭuttom Āticaṇṭeśva ratevarkaṉmika(ḷ)ḷukku cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉāṉa tevakaṇāyakaṉāṉa civatavaṉappallavaraiyaṉum kūttāṭuvāṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampalaveḷāṉum Iviruvom Ivarkaḷ veṇṭikkoḷḷa Ipra māṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ Irukkaiyū(r)ruṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉāṉa civatavaṉamuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu Iṉṉilam mukkāle munṟumāk kāṇiyum
viṟṟukkuṭuttu Ikkācu muvāyiramum kaikkoṇṭamaikku Ivai cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ tevakaṇāyaka(n)ṉāṉa civatavaṉappallavaraiya ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ kūttāṭuvāṉ tirucciṟṟampalaveḷā ṉeḻuttu Itu cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ civatavaṉappallavaraiyaṉ pārikai tirumālai coṉṟāḷum Ivaṉ tāy tiruveṇkāṭṭuṉaṅkaiyum colla camm(ā)tam Iṭṭeṉ peruṅkaiṉal
lūruṭaiyāṉ tiruvottacāmamaḻakiyā ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Irāca rācappallavaraiyaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruñāṉacampantappallavaraiyaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Āṉantapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tuḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ tirumaṅkaiyāḻvaāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ karuppū(r)ruṭaiyāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Aṇṇavāyiluṭaiyāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vikkirama coḻapaṭṭaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 5.984 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
